product_name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Long Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization via App
date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
title: Awesome ear set -- can't be beat at this price point
body: Outstanding! For the low price (~$20), this is an amazing ear set. I have been using Apple Airpods and then SamSung Buds for the past 6 years. As expected, this set does not have all the features like Apple's or Samsung's, but having used this set for several months, now I am wondering if I ever really needed those features (for a price of $150-200!). Great sound, long battery, light but solid build quality, coupled with no fear of losing! The only thing is that when I drop it on the floor, it opens up. Each pod is made of two pieces, which separate as it hits the floor. After having to click them back together several times, I added superglue before click them back on both sides. Now they don't open up. Definitely recommend this set.

product_name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Long Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization via App
date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
title: best buds for the price. look no further.
body: I never write reviews, but I have to for this product. Just as most have said, these are AWESOME. I have had nothing but bad experiences with other wireless earbuds so I stayed away from them. But as my over the ear headphones of 8 years stopped working, I had to buy new headphones so I decided to give them another chance. I kept hearing good things about Soundcore so I trusted the reviews and they live up to the hype completely. The audio quality of course isn't the best, but it's clear enough, loud enough, and has enough fidelity not just for the pricepoint, but in my honest opinion exceeds it. But the most important thing of all, connectivity. That is the number one factor when looking for wireless earbuds. Many earbuds have decent quality, but if they don't stay connected, who cares. These always stay connected. Previous earbuds, the right would connect but not the left. This is because with other earbuds the right is the primary connected device, while the left is connected to the right bud. With these, it seems both buds are connected simultaneously. Also, these aren't just good for music and movies, even in games they don't lose their synchronicity. Only one problem, when I tried playing a PC game and watching a movie at the same time, the buds did cause significant lag and input delays in my game, but that is totally forgiveable. When the buds are dedicated just t your game and not to another app they work very decently. Most wireless earbuds I tried in the past always had this problem of synchronizing to games. I am absolutely blown away at the quality of these for the price. The biggest downside I have heard is they only last about a year before they stop being functional. But still, for only $20 these are unbeatable if you're on a budget. I recommend the a20i over the p20i as the bass is a little too loud, but you can easily fix this by downloading the soundcore app and choosing the "reduce bass" EQ setting. Also, these are bluetooth only. They don't utilize a USB dongle. So if you have an older laptop or desktop that doesn't have bluetooth, you will need to purchase either a bluetooth dongle or a bluetooth/wifi PCI-E card for your desktop.

product_name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Long Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization via App
date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
title: Incredible, beats Gen 1 Airpods at $20 on sale. Great Bang-4-Buck!
body: Anker makes really good stuff all the time. For a really good price no less. They are a real bang-for-buck type company in the best way meaning possible. These earbuds are genuinely very impressive. I’d say they are most definitely better than Airpod gen 1’s. The cups are excellent and cut off any outside noise. The bass is very smooth for this price point, the vocals are clear, maybe the treble is a little overpowered by the bass, but besides the bigger charging case and slightly bigger appearance and fit, these are superior to gen 1 airpods for sure and for $20 on sale you literally cannot beat this with any other option. The charge hold time is excellent too and the case charges fast.

product_name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Long Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization via App
date: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026
title: One of the Worlds BEST Earpods
body: I bought two of these, They Worked Great but after around 9 months they lose their spark and for me the bluetooth isnt working anymore, And also The magnet loses its strenght and when dropped the earbuds fly out, Other than that they are AWESOME, they fit well, they sound better than 99% of the earpods, they are around the same size as a airpod, And they have touch contols! If you are looking for a Budget Earpod without Noise cancellation, You should pick These, they will last you around 9 -12 months if used daily👍

title: They’re fine but not my favorite.
body: I gave these ear pods three stars because I really haven’t had big issues with them - they are just a basic, mediocre set of ear buds in my opinion. I bought these to use until I can afford new AirPods. They are fine, but there are definitely things I dislike about them. The sound quality is just ok, and sometimes it’ll do this thing where the sound goes in and out. That doesn’t happen often, thankfully. Also, they do not stop playing the audio if you take them out of your ears and don’t put them right in the case.

title: Incredible for the price

title: Awesome ear set -- can't be beat at this price point
body: Outstanding! For the low price (~$20), this is an amazing ear set. I have been using Apple Airpods and then SamSung Buds for the past 6 years. As expected, this set does not have all the features like Apple's or Samsung's, but having used this set for several months, now I am wondering if I ever really needed those features (for a price of $150-200!). Great sound, long battery, light but solid build quality, coupled with no fear of losing! The only thing is that when I drop it on the floor, it opens up. Each pod is made of two pieces, which separate as it hits the floor. After having to click them back together several times, I added superglue before click them back on both sides. Now they don't open up. Definitely recommend this set.

product_name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization via App
date: Reviewed in the United States on April 17, 2026
title: best buds for the price. look no further.
body: I never write reviews, but I have to for this product. Just as most have said, these are AWESOME. I have had nothing but bad experiences with other wireless earbuds so I stayed away from them. But as my over the ear headphones of 8 years stopped working, I had to buy new headphones so I decided to give them another chance. I kept hearing good things about Soundcore so I trusted the reviews and they live up to the hype completely. The audio quality of course isn't the best, but it's clear enough, loud enough, and has enough fidelity not just for the pricepoint, but in my honest opinion exceeds it. But the most important thing of all, connectivity. That is the number one factor when looking for wireless earbuds. Many earbuds have decent quality, but if they don't stay connected, who cares. These always stay connected. Previous earbuds, the right would connect but not the left. This is because with other earbuds the right is the primary connected device, while the left is connected to the right bud. With these, it seems both buds are connected simultaneously. Also, these aren't just good for music and movies, even in games they don't lose their synchronicity. Only one problem, when I tried playing a PC game and watching a movie at the same time, the buds did cause significant lag and input delays in my game, but that is totally forgiveable. When the buds are dedicated just t your game and not to another app they work very decently. Most wireless earbuds I tried in the past always had this problem of synchronizing to games. I am absolutely blown away at the quality of these for the price. The biggest downside I have heard is they only last about a year before they stop being functional. But still, for only $20 these are unbeatable if you're on a budget. I recommend the a20i over the p20i as the bass is a little too loud, but you can easily fix this by downloading the soundcore app and choosing the "reduce bass" EQ setting. Also, these are bluetooth only. They don't utilize a USB dongle. So if you have an older laptop or desktop that doesn't have bluetooth, you will need to purchase either a bluetooth dongle or a bluetooth/wifi PCI-E card for your desktop.

product_name: Soundcore by Anker P20i True Wireless Earbuds, 10mm Drivers with Big Bass, Bluetooth 5.3, 30H Playtime, Water-Resistant, 2 Mics for AI Clear Calls, 22 Preset EQs, Customization via App

product_name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones Bass Stereo, Ear Buds with Noise Cancelling Mic, LED Display in Ear Earphones Clear Calls, IP7 Waterproof Bluetooth Earbuds for Phones/Sports/Laptop, White
date: Reviewed in the United States on April 7, 2026
title: BUY THEM!!
body: Don’t waste your money on Apple AirPods!! These are BETTER!!!! My AirPods recently broke and I didn’t want to spend another $300+ on a new pair, so I figured I’d just get these for now. But I was not expected them to be this good of quality for such an affordable price. I have a cleaning business and so I use headphones every single day for at least 2-5 hours straight and my AirPods use to die SO FAST. Even if I charged the case over night. I have had these headphones for at least 4-5 days now, haven’t charged them once and the battery life is still at 80%. They also fit so much better in my ears, AirPods always felt loose and would fall out with too much movement (at least for me) but these fit so much better. The case is very good quality as well. I rarely used both AirPods in both ears so I didn’t really use the noise cancellation too much, but these have a very similar volume and quality of sound. Cannot recommend enough!!!!

product_name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones Bass Stereo, Ear Buds with Noise Cancelling Mic, LED Display in Ear Earphones Clear Calls, IP7 Waterproof Bluetooth Earbuds for Phones/Sports/Laptop, White
date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
title: Very good but note it has a strong "V" shaped spectrum
body: This set is designed and assembled very well and a good value. I like that the display shows the state of charge as a graph for each earbud. WiFi signal sensitivity and range is excellent and it pairs reliably (although it announces "Connected" too fast after removal from the case to hear it. They have very low digital artifacts and an inaudible noise level in the amplifiers.

product_name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones Bass Stereo, Ear Buds with Noise Cancelling Mic, LED Display in Ear Earphones Clear Calls, IP7 Waterproof Bluetooth Earbuds for Phones/Sports/Laptop, White

title: Great Earbuds!
body: I bought these earbuds for my TV because my cat doesn’t like noise. They work perfectly and have great sound. Either way, these earbuds work absolutely perfectly and I’m super happy with them!!

title: BUY THEM!!
body: Don’t waste your money on Apple AirPods!! These are BETTER!!!! My AirPods recently broke and I didn’t want to spend another $300+ on a new pair, so I figured I’d just get these for now. But I was not expected them to be this good of quality for such an affordable price. I have a cleaning business and so I use headphones every single day for at least 2-5 hours straight and my AirPods use to die SO FAST. Even if I charged the case over night. I have had these headphones for at least 4-5 days now, haven’t charged them once and the battery life is still at 80%. They also fit so much better in my ears, AirPods always felt loose and would fall out with too much movement (at least for me) but these fit so much better. The case is very good quality as well. I rarely used both AirPods in both ears so I didn’t really use the noise cancellation too much, but these have a very similar volume and quality of sound. Cannot recommend enough!!!!

date: Reviewed in the United States on April 27, 2026
title: Great sound, strong battery life, and a lot of features for the price
body: I’m really impressed with these Soundcore P30i earbuds by Anker. The sound quality is very good for the price, especially the bass. Music, videos, and phone calls all sound clear, and the noise cancelling works better than I expected for earbuds in this price range.

product_name: Soundcore P30i by Anker Noise Cancelling Earbuds, Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling, Powerful Bass, 45H Playtime, 2-in-1 Case and Phone Stand, IP54, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 (Green)
date: Reviewed in the United States on January 1, 2026
title: It’s the tricks, not the kicks
body: For pure sound quality, I recommend the Moondrop Space Travel TWS Earphone Bluetooth 5.3 Noise Canceling True Wireless Stereo IEMs(Black) over these. They are an off-brand, but popular, semi “in ear monitor” quality earbud. However, these Soundcore P30i are a lot easier to set up, change modes, an use, while not giving up much in terms of everyday music and video quality. Especially when watching tv and movies, you won’t likely notice any difference.

product_name: Soundcore P30i by Anker Noise Cancelling Earbuds, Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling, Powerful Bass, 45H Playtime, 2-in-1 Case and Phone Stand, IP54, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 (Green)
date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
title: The battery is unmatched!
body: These are fantastic little earbuds!! The sound quality is marvelous, I used them all the time at work or laying in bed watching a show on my iPad. I love that you’re able to seamlessly connect two devices at once, so I’m able to connect both my iPad and iPhone at the same time. You can’t play stuff simultaneously lets say you want to watch a video on your phone while you’re watching Netflix on the iPad, you can hit play and it’ll pause what you’re watching on your iPad and start playing the video on your phone! These earbuds are small and lightweight, they come with three different sizes to fit in your ear. I don’t use these often to make calls because I feel like they are slightly lacking in that aspect. Have too many instances of the other person not being able to hear me when I have them in. That said, I purchased these earbuds FOREVER ago, made sure they were fully charged and have not had a need to charge them yet! The battery life cannot be beat! They are definitely a great value. You get a fantastic, affordable pair of ear buds with an amazing battery light. Great buy!

product_name: Soundcore P30i by Anker Noise Cancelling Earbuds, Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling, Powerful Bass, 45H Playtime, 2-in-1 Case and Phone Stand, IP54, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 (Green)
date: Reviewed in the United States on March 1, 2026
title: Excellent quality & sound, wish they had real buttons and volume control
body: I wish I could give 4.5 stars instead of just 4. I am a loyal Anker customer, and have had several Anker/Soundcore products over the years. I previously purchased the Soundcore by Anker Life A3i Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds, which I loved, but they had an issue that caused them to stop working before the warranty ran out and Anker replaced them for me with the Soundcore P30i - their customer service is exceptional and I highly recommend them! However, I *like* my new earbuds, but don’t *love* them.

product_name: Soundcore P30i by Anker Noise Cancelling Earbuds, Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling, Powerful Bass, 45H Playtime, 2-in-1 Case and Phone Stand, IP54, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 (Green)

title: Shockingly satisfying in every possible way
body: After spending $1000 in headphones/earbuds in the last 3 years (1 Sony $390, 1 Samsung $350, 1 Google $199), and being disappointed with "cost/benefit" on all 3, I decided to give a shot at this absolutely inexpensive option.

product_name: Soundcore P30i by Anker Noise Cancelling Earbuds, Strong and Smart Noise Cancelling, Powerful Bass, 45H Playtime, 2-in-1 Case and Phone Stand, IP54, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 (Green)
date: Reviewed in the United States on March 29, 2026
title: They are so comfortable and fit very snug!
body: Finally found some ear buds that fit in my ear and actually stay! I have to say I love everything about these little guys, from the comfortable fit to the amazing sound and build qualities Ive known to expect from any Anker / Soundcore products! The noise cancelling works very well! I had the soundcore boom 2 streaming a movie next to me and i couldn't hear it! I havent experienced the battery life yet but I know its going to be good from who makes it. They know know how to make batteries! The case is small and easy to put places! Plus they have tons of colors to choose from and the price is amazing! I bought these as a secondary pair but they just became my daily driver so to speak!

title: The battery is unmatched!

date: Reviewed in France on October 15, 2023
title: Très bon écouteurs sans fils
body: Acheté pour un ami fin décembre 2022 car ces AirPods Pro ne marchaient plus. Il les utilisent depuis presque un an et il en est très satisfait. Écouteur de très bonne qualité. Bon rapport qualité-prix. Bon son. Très bonne autonomie. Le Bluetooth se connecte très facilement autant a un iPhone qu’à un autre téléphone (exemple redmi), déjà testé avec ces téléphones la. Une fois que le Bluetooth est connecté, les écouteurs se connectent seul au téléphone. Seul bémol c’est qu’ils sont très sensibles et lorsqu’on les touche pour les remettre en place cela raccroche la communication téléphonique.

product_name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones with 50H Playback, Deep Bass Stereo Ear Buds Clear Calls with LED Power Display, IPX7 Waterproof, in-Ear Earphones with Mic for Phone/Android/iPad, Jet Black
date: Reviewed in Germany on November 21, 2022
title: Sehr gute Kopfhörer zu fairen Preis
body: Habe jetzt die Kopfhörer fast im täglichen Einsatz. 24 Stunden Lieferung hat problemlos geklappt. Nun zum Grund weshalb ich mich für den Kopfhörer entschieden habe, Bluetooth wird ohne Passwort aufgebaut man benötigt keine extra App die man installieren muss. Nun zum Tragegefühl. Ich habe verhältnismäßig kleine Ohren und schon einige Kopfhörer getestet, die entweder unangenehm gedrückt haben im Gehörgang oder keinen guten Halt hatten und ständig herausgefallen sind. Auch hier bin ich positiv überrascht. Ich spüre die Kopfhörer so gut wie gar nicht. Leicht schräg eingesetzt und dann nach unten drehen, so sitzen sie dann auch fest genug. Jetzt zum Klang. Klang ist Geschmackssache, daher habe ich in der Equalizer Funktion des Smartphones meinen individuellen Klang eingestellt und abgespeichert. Der Bass ist absolut ausreichend, die Höhen übersteuern nicht, auch wenn es mal lauter zur Sache geht. Ich höre von Metal bis RnB eigentlich alles und in jeder Musikrichtung hören sich die Kopfhörer ausgewogen an. Die Bedienung über die touch Einstellung ist intuitiv leider liegt hier mein einziger Kritikpunkt, um die Lautstärke lauter und leiser zu stellen muss man (3x kurz) antippen, dann wird die Lautstärke um eine Stufe erhöht oder verringert. Wenn man hier alle Stufen von ganz leise bis ganz laut durchgedrückt hat, muss man doch einige Klicks durchgeführt. Da ist es einfacher am Handy die Lautstärke über mehrere Stufen zu erhöhen. Wenn eine oder zwei Stufe höher gestellt werden soll sind die 3 Klicks ok. Die Sprachqualität ist gut, das haben mir zumindest meine Gesprächspartner bestätigt. Neben Tragegefühl und Klang ist als drittes die Akkulaufzeit entscheidend. Hier kann ich die Angabe des Herstellers bestätigen. Mein Fazit: absolute Kaufempfehlung.

product_name: Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones with 50H Playback, Deep Bass Stereo Ear Buds Clear Calls with LED Power Display, IPX7 Waterproof, in-Ear Earphones with Mic for Phone/Android/iPad, Black
date: Reviewed in Germany on November 21, 2022
title: Sehr gute Kopfhörer zu fairen Preis
body: Habe jetzt die Kopfhörer fast im täglichen Einsatz. 24 Stunden Lieferung hat problemlos geklappt. Nun zum Grund weshalb ich mich für den Kopfhörer entschieden habe, Bluetooth wird ohne Passwort aufgebaut man benötigt keine extra App die man installieren muss. Nun zum Tragegefühl. Ich habe verhältnismäßig kleine Ohren und schon einige Kopfhörer getestet, die entweder unangenehm gedrückt haben im Gehörgang oder keinen guten Halt hatten und ständig herausgefallen sind. Auch hier bin ich positiv überrascht. Ich spüre die Kopfhörer so gut wie gar nicht. Leicht schräg eingesetzt und dann nach unten drehen, so sitzen sie dann auch fest genug. Jetzt zum Klang. Klang ist Geschmackssache, daher habe ich in der Equalizer Funktion des Smartphones meinen individuellen Klang eingestellt und abgespeichert. Der Bass ist absolut ausreichend, die Höhen übersteuern nicht, auch wenn es mal lauter zur Sache geht. Ich höre von Metal bis RnB eigentlich alles und in jeder Musikrichtung hören sich die Kopfhörer ausgewogen an. Die Bedienung über die touch Einstellung ist intuitiv leider liegt hier mein einziger Kritikpunkt, um die Lautstärke lauter und leiser zu stellen muss man (3x kurz) antippen, dann wird die Lautstärke um eine Stufe erhöht oder verringert. Wenn man hier alle Stufen von ganz leise bis ganz laut durchgedrückt hat, muss man doch einige Klicks durchgeführt. Da ist es einfacher am Handy die Lautstärke über mehrere Stufen zu erhöhen. Wenn eine oder zwei Stufe höher gestellt werden soll sind die 3 Klicks ok. Die Sprachqualität ist gut, das haben mir zumindest meine Gesprächspartner bestätigt. Neben Tragegefühl und Klang ist als drittes die Akkulaufzeit entscheidend. Hier kann ich die Angabe des Herstellers bestätigen. Mein Fazit: absolute Kaufempfehlung.

title: Très bon écouteurs sans fils
body: Acheté pour un ami fin décembre 2022 car ces AirPods Pro ne marchaient plus. Il les utilisent depuis presque un an et il en est très satisfait. Écouteur de très bonne qualité. Auch hier bin ich positiv überrascht. Ich spüre die Kopfhörer so gut wie gar nicht. Leicht schräg eingesetzt und dann nach unten drehen, so sitzen sie dann auch fest genug. Jetzt zum Klang. Klang ist Geschmackssache, daher habe ich in der Equalizer Funktion des Smartphones meinen individuellen Klang eingestellt und abgespeichert. Der Bass ist absolut ausreichend, die Höhen übersteuern nicht, auch wenn es mal lauter zur Sache geht. Ich höre von Metal bis RnB eigentlich alles und in jeder Musikrichtung hören sich die Kopfhörer ausgewogen an. Die Bedienung über die touch Einstellung ist intuitiv leider liegt hier mein einziger Kritikpunkt, um die Lautstärke lauter und leiser zu stellen muss man (3x kurz) antippen, dann wird die Lautstärke um eine Stufe erhöht oder verringert. Wenn man hier alle Stufen von ganz leise bis ganz laut durchgedrückt hat, muss man doch einige Klicks durchgeführt. Da ist es einfacher am Handy die Lautstärke über mehrere Stufen zu erhöhen. Wenn eine oder zwei Stufe höher gestellt werden soll sind die 3 Klicks ok. Die Sprachqualität ist gut, das haben mir zumindest meine Gesprächspartner bestätigt. Neben Tragegefühl und Klang ist als drittes die Akkulaufzeit entscheidend. Hier kann ich die Angabe des Herstellers bestätigen. Mein Fazit: absolute Kaufempfehlung.

date: Reviewed in the United States on April 12, 2026
title: Outstanding value
body: This should be considered a 4.5 review but I am amazed at the features and the overall quality of these earbuds. My beats fit pro finally fell apart and before I bought another pair I wanted to shop around Amazon and I remember Anker being always solid bang for the buck. Who would have thought earbuds under 50 bucks would sound better, more bass, better swear resistance rating, more built in app features including custom sound profiles based on your preferences. Yes there is a feature in the app where it plays a sound clip and based on your selection on which clip sounds better you get a custom sound profile tailored to it. The ANC is on par with my Beats Fit pro I mean do remember how much you are paying the bass is strong the mids and highs sound good. Like I said these sound and built better than they have a right to be at the price. The only feature that some lament is there is no in ear detection not an issue for me. The reason I am going to dock a .5 from nearly perfect earbuds is that there is some random and I mean very random times they disconnect its rare never had this issue with the beats I reset the connection but if I go into the steam room they want to drop. Not a huge deal as it's rare but still present. FYI I am using a OnePlus 13

product_name: Soundcore P31i by Anker, Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling, Hi-Res Sound, Translation Earbuds, 50H Playtime, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Earphones, Spatial Audio, Fast Charging, IP55 (Black)
date: Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026
title: Awesome sound, unbelievable battery life
body: I'm so particular about sound. I have a pair of wired earbuds that I bought more than a decade ago, and I've been trying to find a suitable Bluetooth replacement for years now because the wiring is going. I thought it would never happen until I found these! The sound is awesome. Deep bass, good midrange tones, and clear highs. They come with a variety of sizes of high-quality silicone tips, and once you get the size right it provides excellent sound isolation and increases the audio quality measurably. I had to use the XS tips and finnagle them a bit because my ear canals are quite small apparently. This does mean that if I am chewing or smiling a lot I have to adjust them frequently to keep them in the right place. On that note, one of the things I've hated in my search for Bluetooth earbuds is the tap controls which take any touch as a command to do something (change the volume, advance the track, turn the noise cancellation on or off). For someone who wants to adjust the way the earbuds sit in my ears frequently, touch controls are awful. These have an app in which you CAN DISABLE TOUCH CONTROLS! Hallelujah! Since I'm used to wired earbuds I always have my phone nearby so I control my music with my phone and don't miss touch controls at all. Also on the app you can adjust the equalizer to customize the sound to your preference. There is even a sound preference test that will create your ideal eq profile based on your series of choices comparing alternative sound designs. After my preference test the sound quality went from good to amazing! Battery life on these is also UNBELIEVABLE. I used them for multiple hours a day for about THREE WEEKS, and they were only down to 40% battery when I plugged them in to charge for the first time (I thought about seeing just how long I could go before needing to charge, but we were getting a winter storm and I didn't want to lose power and have low charge on my earbuds). The carrying case is small and convenient. I read someone complain in another review about how the finish on the carrying case makes it very slippery and I thought "what an odd thing to care about," but yeah, now I get it. The number of times I've nearly thrown this case across the room as it slips out of my hands is Mel Brooks-level comical. But hey, nothing is perfect and, as far as faults go, this is an easy one to overlook. The noise cancellation is also very good. I've never used noise cancellation much because the majority of the time I'm using headphones I'm just sitting in my house, and some other headphones I've had inject an obvious and annoying static sound when the noise cancellation is on. As said above I'm all about sound quality so that's no good. But these, I played with the noise cancellation like having the TV on in the background while listening and it does a great job! The TV sound disappeared almost completely and there was only very minor static sound as a tradeoff. Apparently these also can do real-time language translation which is pretty cool, but I havent had occasion to try it out yet. All in all these are SO AWESOME and CONVENIENT that I'm listening to tons more music. Love them love them love them, cannot recommend more highly.

product_name: Soundcore P31i by Anker, Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling, Hi-Res Sound, Translation Earbuds, 50H Playtime, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Earphones, Spatial Audio, Fast Charging, IP55 (Black)
date: Reviewed in the United States on February 23, 2026
title: Better than my Air Pods or Beats buds
body: Everything has to be evaluated by price, quality, performance, and durability. I'm a musician and audio nerd. Soundcore is making ridiculously good quality audio gear for 1/4 of the price, and I don't know how they're doing it. I have these earbuds and the Boom 2 Bluetooth speaker, and both of them are crisp, have great audio nuance, and the app has great options for sound profiles. Sure, the Air Pods and the Beats are a bit more hefty (durable), but Air Pod sound is overly crisp (almost too manipulated), and Bears are very underwhelming to me (made mostly for that scooped Hip Hop audio experience). I like mids in my listening experience. I like to hear that 3rd guitar track way in the background, or that occasionally syncopated tap on an old drum break bell. For me bass needs to clear, highs need to be crisp without getting into your skull with that ultra crisp dog whistle buzz some equipment produces, and mids need to be present and bring an immersed experience. These buds do all of that, especially with the EQ options in the app. So far I like flat, Acoustic for a mid and low bump, or Electronic for a small variant of the Acoustic EQ. I'll make some custom EQs for myself eventually too.

body: This should be considered a 4.5 review but I am amazed at the features and the overall quality of these earbuds. product_name: Soundcore P31i by Anker, Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling, Hi-Res Sound, Translation Earbuds, 50H Playtime, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Earphones, Spatial Audio, Fast Charging, IP55 (Pink)
date: Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026
title: Awesome sound, unbelievable battery life
body: I'm so particular about sound. I have a pair of wired earbuds that I bought more than a decade ago, and I've been trying to find a suitable Bluetooth replacement for years now because the wiring is going. I thought it would never happen until I found these! The sound is awesome. Deep bass, good midrange tones, and clear highs. They come with a variety of sizes of high-quality silicone tips, and once you get the size right it provides excellent sound isolation and increases the audio quality measurably. I had to use the XS tips and finnagle them a bit because my ear canals are quite small apparently. This does mean that if I am chewing or smiling a lot I have to adjust them frequently to keep them in the right place. On that note, one of the things I've hated in my search for Bluetooth earbuds is the tap controls which take any touch as a command to do something (change the volume, advance the track, turn the noise cancellation on or off). For someone who wants to adjust the way the earbuds sit in my ears frequently, touch controls are awful. These have an app in which you CAN DISABLE TOUCH CONTROLS! Hallelujah! Since I'm used to wired earbuds I always have my phone nearby so I control my music with my phone and don't miss touch controls at all. Also on the app you can adjust the equalizer to customize the sound to your preference. There is even a sound preference test that will create your ideal eq profile based on your series of choices comparing alternative sound designs. After my preference test the sound quality went from good to amazing! Battery life on these is also UNBELIEVABLE. I used them for multiple hours a day for about THREE WEEKS, and they were only down to 40% battery when I plugged them in to charge for the first time (I thought about seeing just how long I could go before needing to charge, but we were getting a winter storm and I didn't want to lose power and have low charge on my earbuds). The carrying case is small and convenient. I read someone complain in another review about how the finish on the carrying case makes it very slippery and I thought "what an odd thing to care about," but yeah, now I get it. The number of times I've nearly thrown this case across the room as it slips out of my hands is Mel Brooks-level comical. But hey, nothing is perfect and, as far as faults go, this is an easy one to overlook. The noise cancellation is also very good. I've never used noise cancellation much because the majority of the time I'm using headphones I'm just sitting in my house, and some other headphones I've had inject an obvious and annoying static sound when the noise cancellation is on. As said above I'm all about sound quality so that's no good. But these, I played with the noise cancellation like having the TV on in the background while listening and it does a great job! The TV sound disappeared almost completely and there was only very minor static sound as a tradeoff. Apparently these also can do real-time language translation which is pretty cool, but I havent had occasion to try it out yet. All in all these are SO AWESOME and CONVENIENT that I'm listening to tons more music. Love them love them love them, cannot recommend more highly.

product_name: Soundcore P31i by Anker, Real-Time Adaptive Noise Cancelling, Hi-Res Sound, Translation Earbuds, 50H Playtime, Wireless Earbuds, Bluetooth Earphones, Spatial Audio, Fast Charging, IP55 (Pink)
date: Reviewed in the United States on February 23, 2026
title: Better than my Air Pods or Beats buds
body: Everything has to be evaluated by price, quality, performance, and durability. I'm a musician and audio nerd. Soundcore is making ridiculously good quality audio gear for 1/4 of the price, and I don't know how they're doing it. I have these earbuds and the Boom 2 Bluetooth speaker, and both of them are crisp, have great audio nuance, and the app has great options for sound profiles. Sure, the Air Pods and the Beats are a bit more hefty (durable), but Air Pod sound is overly crisp (almost too manipulated), and Bears are very underwhelming to me (made mostly for that scooped Hip Hop audio experience). I like mids in my listening experience. I like to hear that 3rd guitar track way in the background, or that occasionally syncopated tap on an old drum break bell. For me bass needs to clear, highs need to be crisp without getting into your skull with that ultra crisp dog whistle buzz some equipment produces, and mids need to be present and bring an immersed experience. These buds do all of that, especially with the EQ options in the app. So far I like flat, Acoustic for a mid and low bump, or Electronic for a small variant of the Acoustic EQ. I'll make some custom EQs for myself eventually too.

product_name: JBL Tune Buds - True wireless Noise Cancelling earbuds, JBL Pure Bass Sound, Bluetooth 5.3, 4-Mic technology for Crisp, Clear Calls, Up to 48 hours of battery life, Water and dust resistant (Black)
date: Reviewed in the United States on September 18, 2025
title: Sound like $200 plus, no regrets here!
body: Very comfortable, decent noise cancelling, both ear bud & case batteries last better than my last pair of Sony earbuds. I do not have excellent ears, age, heredity, and industrial noise have seen to that, so the highs are probably wasted on me, but I have enjoyed the excellent image these buds create; I have a favorite recording of Handel's "Messiah", and it's easy to "see" where each soloist and group of singers, along with the parts of the orchestra are arranged, like you would at a live performance. As one group sings, then another one comes in you can hear the source coming from another area. The earbuds do work themselves out from time to time, but give warning & are easy to reposition. My last pair was the best Sony model, which I lost one of. I didn't want to drop another $250 , so I bought these. Now I never will. Tremendous value, with no indication of being cheap. One tiny issue: when dropped from waist high or higher onto a hard surface , the case invariably pops open and ejects both earbuds several feet. My fault, of course, but just saying. 10 month update: quality continues; sound is excellent & both earbud and holder batteries continue to last and last.

product_name: JBL Tune Buds - True wireless Noise Cancelling earbuds, JBL Pure Bass Sound, Bluetooth 5.3, 4-Mic technology for Crisp, Clear Calls, Up to 48 hours of battery life, Water and dust resistant (Black)
date: Reviewed in the United States on March 5, 2026
title: Great buds that I will keep coming back for
body: When I lost my last pair, I immediately ordered it again, these are the best in my opinion. The sound quality and battery life are great for the price and for my needs, and it charges quickly. I had to upgrade to these after the previous generation of BT kept losing connection. These stay connected perfectly. My own suggestion is DO NOT but it used. The ones I bought before this one were used because I was in a tight spot, and it said "like new", so what could go wrong, right? Yeah, I took it out of the package and one of the buds was caked with old dried earwax. I cleaned it as best I could and used it for a week. It kept dropping the connection which was of course a deal breaker for me, so I ended up buying the next pair NEW on my next paycheck. Now I'm back to the same great experience that made me purchase it in the first place.

title: Very good quality!!
body: They are comfortable, and don't slip much when you're active and moving around like some other over-ear headphones I've had. The sound itself, I found, is actually their best quality. They handle bass impressively well and the sound itself is dynamic and full. The battery is actually pretty decent as well. They charge fast and last a good while before needing to do so again. When worn, I was not able to hear most background/environment sounds; so they do have a passive noise-cancellation when you have them on. I do find that they are also greatly responsive. No matter how lightly I tap the interface, they always recognize the interaction for the different functions (pausing, changing volume, etc.) available without me having to try it 2 and 3 different times. Overall, I do enjoy the functionality and performance. I highly recommend!

title: Fantastic fit, design and great value
body: These AirPods are my absolute favorite. I love these because unlike some Pro models, they don't come with foam or rubber earpieces which to me, are not very comfortable. These AirPods fit perfectly, fully compatible with all Apple devices, quality and durability is what one expects from Apple. date: Reviewed in the United States on April 2, 2026
title: Absolutely amazing noise cancellation!
body: My original AirPods were from pre-2020 I think? They were still working technically, but they weren’t really holding a charge anymore and I had replaced the charging unit back in 2021, so it felt like instead of replacing that again maybe it was best to just get a new pair. I can’t even express how IMPRESSED I was with the noise cancellation! It’s honestly amazing coming from someone who has not had noise canceling headphones. The adaptive learning feature is also so cool - there’s several features but I like the one that listen to hear if there’s a conversation going and then it lowers the audio you’re listening to. There’s also a spacial awareness type one to hear what’s going on around you, like you would without noise cancellation. But it’s the noise cancellation that’s the real star of the show. When I was on a plane and I put these in my ears without even listening to anything audio wise, it numbed the sound of the plane so much and made it so quiet it was amazing. They’re small, and light in weight. The quality is just amazing - Apple does it again! They connected with my iPhone Pro 16 so well, instantly. I really can’t say enough positive things they’re worth every dollar.

date: Reviewed in the United States on January 18, 2026
title: I had high hopes, maybe I just got a dud pair. Raycon made it right!
body: Edit/update! 1/29/2026. Raycon contacted me and offered a full refund! Either someone actually reads the comments or it's AI, either way, I was shocked! I am really glad that they reached out and offered a refund. I will keep my hopes up that they look into the issues and maybe update the contact method. I really wanted to believe that I got a dud pair and now I am more convinced that it is what happened. I am changing the 2 star to 5, if anyone cares, haha. There is room for improvement. However, with their response to the issue, and the sound quality and price previously mentioned, I am pleased. Seems like they genuinely want to satisfy the consumer. Thank you Raycon!

date: Reviewed in the United States on July 23, 2022
title: Solid "B" grade. 3.5 stars, Music sounds great, phone works great, awareness mode needs help.
body: I got the E25's, black. Packaging is nice, comes with a brief, clearly written user manual which I used right away to see how to change the sound options. I use a Samsung Galaxy S20 FE 5G, and I took these buds out of the package, directly out of the case and put them right in. The default female voice told me they were powered on right away, sounding in both ears, in the order i put them in. Opened bluetooth options on my phone and they were already listed as "Raycon Everyday Buds." I touched the name and they connected right off without any issue whatsoever. Hit play on my music, and I love the sound. I just opened them today, so I'm waiting to see how these endure before giving full stars.

product_name: Raycon Everyday Classic Bluetooth Wireless Earbuds + Microphone with Active Noise Canceling, Sweat & Water-Resistant Earphones, Ear Buds Wireless Bluetooth Up to 32 Hours Playtime (Blue)
date: Reviewed in the United States on July 23, 2022
title: Solid "B" grade. 3.5 stars, Music sounds great, phone works great, awareness mode needs help.
body: I got the E25's, black. Packaging is nice, comes with a brief, clearly written user manual which I used right away to see how to change the sound options. I use a Samsung Galaxy S20 FE 5G, and I took these buds out of the package, directly out of the case and put them right in. The default female voice told me they were powered on right away, sounding in both ears, in the order i put them in. Opened bluetooth options on my phone and they were already listed as "Raycon Everyday Buds." I touched the name and they connected right off without any issue whatsoever. Hit play on my music, and I love the sound. I just opened them today, so I'm waiting to see how these endure before giving full stars.

title: I had high hopes, maybe I just got a dud pair. Raycon made it right!
body: Edit/update! 1/29/2026. Raycon contacted me and offered a full refund! Either someone actually reads the comments or it's AI, either way, I was shocked! I am really glad that they reached out and offered a refund. I will keep my hopes up that they look into the issues and maybe update the contact method. I really wanted to believe that I got a dud pair and now I am more convinced that it is what happened. I am changing the 2 star to 5, if anyone cares, haha. There is room for improvement. However, with their response to the issue, and the sound quality and price previously mentioned, I am pleased. Seems like they genuinely want to satisfy the consumer. Thank you Raycon!

date: Reviewed in the United States on February 22, 2026
title: Impressive Sound & Noise Cancellation for the Price!
body: These earbuds exceeded my expectations! The sound quality is crisp and balanced, with deep bass that doesn’t overpower the mids and highs. The active noise cancellation actually works — it blocks out background noise really well, which makes a huge difference when I’m on calls or just trying to enjoy music without distractions.

product_name: Active Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth Headphones 80H Playtime Ear Buds with Power Display Case Hi-Res Sound & Clear Calls Over Ear Hooks Earphones for Sports Running Gym Workout Black
date: Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2026
title: Holy Crap.
body: I do not write a lot of reviews, so a product has to be VERY compelling for me to write one. These earbuds are FIRE. Other than full-sized headphones, they are probably the best quality buds I've ever had. WAY better than the JBL over-ear buds. It's not even close. They're super loud. The base is crispy and doesnt crack. I was truly shocked by the quality from the moment I played the first song.

product_name: Active Noise Cancelling Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth Headphones 80H Playtime Ear Buds with Power Display Case Hi-Res Sound & Clear Calls Over Ear Hooks Earphones for Sports Running Gym Workout Black
date: Reviewed in the United States on February 16, 2026
title: Great price, great sound and super comfortable!
body: I basically use them for riding my bike, walking and hiking; they are comfortable and they never fall off. The sound quality is excellent and it’s easy to start and stop music with a push of the button that’s easy to find. The battery life seems very good, and you can see from the charging case exactly how much you you have left. I highly recommend this product to anyone who is quality and value conscious.
